title: Sportscene Old Firm highlights

title: Newcastle letting leads slip too often - Howe
summary: Newcastle drew 1-1 with Nottingham Forest after conceding a late equalizer. Manager Eddie Howe attributed the result to the team's recurring issue of surrendering leads.
content: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe said his side is letting too many leads slip after they concedec a late equaliser to draw 1-1 with Nottingham Forest.

zh.title: 纽卡频繁浪费领先优势 - 豪
zh.summary: 纽卡在后期失球被扳平1-1战平诺丁汉森林。主教练埃迪·豪将失利归咎于球队经常浪费领先的顽疾。

title: Celtic eye own fairytale as Hearts' story continues to captivate
summary: Celtic have defeated Rangers and are now pursuing Hearts in the Scottish Premiership's final stretch. Derek McInnes' Hearts side faces a challenge to maintain their lead in a tumultuous campaign.
content: Celtic have taken care of Rangers and are coming for Hearts. Can Derek McInnes' side hold them off in the final days of a tumultuous campaign?

zh.title: 凯尔特人追求童话故事，哈茨队的故事继续精彩
zh.summary: 凯尔特人战胜流浪者队，现在在苏超收官阶段追赶哈茨。德里克·麦因尼斯执教的哈茨队在动荡赛季中面临保持领先的挑战。

title: Are Celtic now favourites to win Scottish Premiership?
summary: Hearts have led the Scottish Premiership since October and hold a one-point advantage with two games remaining. Celtic's recent form has renewed debate over who will ultimately claim the title.
content: Hearts have led the Scottish Premiership since October and remain one point ahead with two games to go - but are Celtic now favourites for the title?

zh.title: 凯尔特人现在是苏超夺冠热门吗？
zh.summary: 哈茨自10月以来一直领跑苏格兰超级联赛，目前领先一分，还剩两场比赛。凯尔特人最近的表现重新引发了关于谁将最终获得冠军的争论。

title: Howe 'looking at the future' with Gordon omission
summary: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe benched forward Anthony Gordon for the second consecutive week. Howe cited his focus on developing the team's future direction as the reason for the omission.
content: Newcastle United head coach Eddie Howe says he left forward Anthony Gordon on the bench for the second week running because he is "looking at the future".

zh.title: 豪伊"放眼未来"，戈登遭弃用
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔主帅埃迪·豪伊连续第二周将前锋安东尼·戈登放在替补席上。豪伊引用他专注于发展球队未来方向作为弃用的原因。

title: Why Brighton's first Women's FA Cup final felt like it was coming
summary: Brighton have reached their first Women's FA Cup final, moving within one victory of capturing their first major silverware. The achievement marks a significant milestone in the club's history.
content: Brighton reach their first Women's FA Cup final - and within one victory of a first piece of major silverware in the club's history.

zh.title: 为什么布莱顿首次女足足总杯决赛感觉是必然的
zh.summary: 布莱顿进入了他们首次女足足总杯决赛，距离获得首个重大荣誉仅一步之遥。这一成就标志着俱乐部历史上的一个重要里程碑。

title: World Cup debutants to wear collectable patches on shirts
summary: Players making their first World Cup appearance at this summer's tournament will wear a special debut patch on their shirts. The collectable patches distinguish debut players in the competition.
content: All players who make their first tournament appearance at this summer's Fifa World Cup will wear a debut patch on their shirts.

zh.title: 世界杯首次参赛球员将在球衣上佩戴收藏补丁
zh.summary: 在今年夏季锦标赛中首次出战世界杯的球员将在球衣上佩戴特殊的首秀补丁。这些可收集的补丁用来区分该赛事中的首次亮相球员。

title: 'Fantastic' Villa deserved to win - Emery
summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery praised his team's performance as "fantastic" despite their 2-2 draw with Burnley at Turf Moor. Emery believed Villa deserved the three points based on their display.
content: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery says his side was "fantastic" and deserved all three points following a 2-2 with Burnley at Turf Moor.

zh.title: "出色的"维拉应该赢得胜利 - 埃默里
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主教练乌奈·埃默里赞扬他的球队表现"出色"，尽管他们与伯恩利在草皮公园战成2-2平手。埃默里认为维拉基于他们的表现应该获得三分。

title: Everton not out of European chase yet - Moyes
summary: David Moyes stated that Everton remain in contention for European football despite drawing 2-2 with Crystal Palace. The team must improve after five consecutive Premier League matches without a win.
content: David Moyes believes Everton are still in the hunt for European football but need to "step up" their pursuit, having gone five Premier League games without a win following a 2-2 draw with Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.

zh.title: 埃弗顿还未放弃欧洲梦 - 莫耶斯
zh.summary: 大卫·莫耶斯表示，尽管埃弗顿与水晶宫战成2-2平手，但埃弗顿仍有望争夺欧洲足球资格。在英超5场不胜后，球队必须有所改进。

title: 'O'Neill has made Celtic players better'
summary: Celtic mounted a comeback from a goal down to defeat Rangers in their battle to retain the Scottish Premiership title. Manager O'Neill's influence is cited as key to the team's improved performance.
content: Celtic come from a goal down to beat Rangers in their battle to retain the league title.

zh.title: 奥尼尔提升了凯尔特人队球员的水平
zh.summary: 凯尔特人队从落后一球的局面逆转击败流浪者队，争取保卫苏格兰超级联赛冠军。经理奥尼尔的影响被认为是球队性能改善的关键。

title: Hearts & Celtic seal Champions League qualifier spots
summary: Hearts will compete in the Champions League qualifiers next season for the first time in 20 years. Celtic's victory over Rangers confirmed both teams a top-two finish in the Scottish Premiership.
content: Hearts will play in the Champions League qualifiers next season for the first time in 20 years as Celtic's win over Rangers guarantees a top-two Scottish Premiership finish.

zh.title: 哈茨和凯尔特人确保欧冠资格赛席位
zh.summary: 哈茨队将在下赛季参加欧冠资格赛，这是20年来的首次。凯尔特人队击败流浪者队的胜利确保了两队在苏格兰超级联赛中的前两名。

title: Flick to lead Barca v Real despite father's death
summary: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick will lead the team in Sunday's El Clasico against Real Madrid despite the recent death of his father. Flick has decided to proceed with his managerial duties.
content: Manager Hansi Flick will take charge of Barcelona in Sunday's El Clasico against Real Madrid despite the death of his father.

zh.title: 弗利克尽管父亲去世仍将率领巴萨对阵皇马
zh.summary: 尽管最近父亲去世，巴塞罗那主教练汉西·弗利克将在周日的国家德比中率领球队对阵皇家马德里。弗利克已决定继续履行其主管职责。

title: Contracts and transfers - Wrexham's summer in-tray
summary: Wrexham faces several important personnel decisions ahead of the 2026-27 season as the Championship side works to strengthen their squad. The club must resolve key contract and transfer matters during the summer transfer window to build on their progress.
content: BBC Sport looks at the key issues Championship side Wrexham need to resolve this summer in a bid to be even stronger in 2026-27.

zh.title: 合同和转会 - 雷克汉姆的夏季待办事项
zh.summary: 随着英冠球队在2026-27赛季前努力加强阵容，雷克汉姆面临着几项重要的人事决策。该俱乐部必须在夏季转会窗口期间解决关键的合同和转会问题，以巩固他们的进展。

title: 'Bologna target Verona's Bowie' - gossip
summary: Bologna has reportedly identified Hellas Verona striker Kieron Bowie as a potential transfer target for the Serie A club. Meanwhile, Celtic defender Liam Scales has confirmed his commitment to the Scottish club despite receiving interest from other teams.
content: Bologna reportedly target Hellas Verona striker Kieron Bowie as Liam Scales says he had no interest in leaving Celtic despite interest from other clubs.

zh.title: "博洛尼亚目标维罗纳的鲍威" - 传言
zh.summary: 据报道，博洛尼亚已将赫拉斯维罗纳前锋基隆·鲍威确定为意甲俱乐部的潜在转会目标。同时，凯尔特人后卫利亚姆·斯凯尔斯尽管受到其他球队的关注，但已确认了对这支苏格兰球队的承诺。

title: What next for Kieran Trippier?
summary: Newcastle United defender Kieran Trippier remains undecided about his future beyond his current club, keeping his options open while prioritizing finishing strong at St James' Park. The veteran defender's stance suggests he will evaluate opportunities available to him during the transfer window.
content: Newcastle United defender Kieran Trippier has an open mind about his next move as he focuses on finishing his St James' Park stay on a high.

zh.title: 基朗·特里皮尔接下来会怎样？
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队后卫基朗·特里皮尔仍未决定其在现任俱乐部之外的未来，保持开放态度，同时优先考虑在圣詹姆斯公园的强势表现。这位资深后卫的立场表明他将在转会窗口期间评估可用的机会。

title: Quiz: Name all the clubs who have won La Liga
summary: Nine clubs have won Spain's La Liga since 1929; this quiz tests knowledge of all the winners in the competition's history.
content: Nine clubs have won Spain's La Liga since the competition began in 1929. Can you name them all?

zh.title: 测试：列举所有赢得西甲冠军的俱乐部
zh.summary: 自1929年以来，9家俱乐部赢得过西班牙西甲联赛冠军；这项测试考查你对该赛事历史上所有冠军的了解。

title: How could extreme weather affect World Cup 2026?
summary: As the 2026 World Cup approaches, extreme weather conditions in North America could disrupt matches and significantly impact the tournament this summer.
content: With almost a month to go until the start of the World Cup, Simon King looks ahead to the weather's potential to disrupt the tournament this summer.

zh.title: 极端天气如何影响2026年世界杯？
zh.summary: 随着2026年世界杯临近，北美的极端天气条件可能会中断比赛，并对今年夏季的赛事产生重大影响。
